name: verdict
description: Verdict — a small Elm-like language that compiles to FinVM bytecode (JSON). Runs on Node and in the browser.

scripts.bundle: npx --yes esbuild output/Verdict.Compiler/index.js --bundle --format=esm --outfile=web/verdict.mjs && npx --yes esbuild output/Verdict.Compiler/index.js --bundle --format=iife --global-name=Verdict --outfile=web/verdict.global.js
